headline: Cox Media fined after bragging it spied on users through their phones
summary: Cox Media and marketing firms fined by FTC. They claimed to secretly listen to users via phones and smart devices. The controversy involved little evidence of actual spying capabilities.

headline: The best Memorial Day sales you can shop this weekend
summary: Memorial Day sales are currently in full swing. Find deals on portable speakers and solar lights. Great time to grab essentials for outdoor activities like pool parties.

headline: Pope Leo calls for being ‘profoundly human’ in the age of AI
summary: Pope Leo XIV released his first major papal document, "Magnifica Humanitas." The manifesto warns of AI risks and unconstrained technological power. Discusses dangers of AI warfare and impact on labor.

headline: Here are our favorite last-minute deals from REI’s giant Anniversary Sale
summary: REI’s annual Anniversary Sale, their biggest of the year, is ongoing. Save on outdoor essentials like tents, sleeping pads, and stoves. Perfect time to stock up for upcoming camping trips.

headline: Save $950 Off the Massively Powerful Lenovo Legion Pro 7 RTX 5090 Gaming Laptop for Memorial Day
summary: Massive $950 discount on the Lenovo Legion Pro 7 RTX 5090 Gaming Laptop. Features a 16" 2500x1600 240Hz OLED display. Includes a copy of the game 007: First Light.

headline: Save 25% Off the Steelseries Arctis Nova 7 Gen 2 Wireless Gaming Headset for Memorial Day
summary: Get 25% off the Steelseries Arctis Nova 7 Gen 2 Wireless Gaming Headset. This deal marks a new lowest price for the headset. Available during the Memorial Day sale.

headline: Forza Horizon 6 Has Its Own Boogeyman, and Players are Terrified
summary: Forza Horizon 6 players are encountering a terrifying "boogeyman." The mysterious Drivatar is known as "bowie knife99." The myth is sending shivers down players' spines.

headline: Save 20% Off the Apple AirPods Pro 3 Earbuds During the Amazon Memorial Day Sale
summary: Apple AirPods Pro 3 Earbuds are 20% off. Considered the best noise-canceling earbuds for iPhone. Available during the Amazon Memorial Day Sale.

headline: Former SNP chief executive Peter Murrell in custody after admitting £400,000 embezzlement
summary: Peter Murrell, former SNP chief executive, is in custody. He admitted to embezzling £400,000. Murrell is the estranged husband of former Scotland first minister Nicola Sturgeon.

headline: The questions raised by the Murrell embezzlement controversy
summary: The Murrell embezzlement case has plagued the SNP for five years. It has been described as a "toxic cloud" over the party. The controversy has raised significant questions.

headline: Hottest May day on record in UK as temperatures pass 34C
summary: The UK recorded its hottest May day on record. Temperatures surpassed 34C. Follows the warmest May night on Sunday, reaching 19.4C.

headline: Woman dies after being shot outside Sheffield bar
summary: A 30-year-old woman died after being shot in Sheffield. She was found with serious injuries outside a bar on Monday. Three people are currently in police custody.
